title: bus.triage.findings v1
description: Triage engine signal emitted when a failure pattern or anomaly is detected. Carries diagnosis, recommended action, and evidence. Source: /hearth-loom.

signal_name.description: Identifier for the signal type (e.g. trailer_failure_pattern)

diagnosis.description: Human-readable description of the detected pattern

action.description: Recommended remediation action (shell command or next step)

evidence.description: Raw evidence string with counts, windows, and class info

bead_filed.description: Bead ID filed as a result of this finding

outcome.description: What happened with the finding (currently only 'filed')

detected_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the pattern was detected
